title: Fix game status chip — LIVE shown for unstarted games
objective: The game context pill on position cards shows 'i1 · LIVE' with a green dot for games that haven't started yet. ESPN reports inning=1 and game_status='STATUS_IN_PROGRESS' during pre-game warmup, and the current gameStatusChip() function treats any truthy inning value as LIVE. Fix using the game_status field and only show inning/live-dot for genuinely live games.
queued_reason: Same file as DASH_011 — activate only after DASH_011 is APPROVED
status: QUEUED — DO NOT START. Wait for REVIEW_DASH_011.md Decision: APPROVED before executing.

context.root_cause_1: gameStatusChip() (line ~666) returns 'LIVE' whenever item.inning is truthy. ESPN sends inning=1 during pre-game warmup, so the pill shows 'i1 · LIVE' before the game starts.
context.root_cause_2: The live-dot () always renders inside the gameCtxPill regardless of game status — green dot for scheduled games is misleading.
context.root_cause_3: The inning number renders whenever r.inning is truthy — even for scheduled/pre-game games where inning=1 is warmup noise.
context.available_data: Shadow recs carry a game_status field (e.g. 'STATUS_IN_PROGRESS', 'STATUS_PRE_GAME', 'STATUS_SCHEDULED', 'STATUS_FINAL'). This field is available on the rec object but gameStatusChip() does not use it.

deliverables.label: Fix 1 — Update gameStatusChip() to use game_status field
Fix 2 — Only show live-dot and inning for live games
deliverables.where: buildUnifiedPositionCards() — near line 684 where inn is declared, and line 721 where gameCtxPill is built

acceptance_criteria: A scheduled/pre-game position card shows 'SCHEDULED' status — NOT 'LIVE' or 'i1'
No green live-dot on cards for scheduled/pre-game games
No inning number shown for scheduled/pre-game games
A genuinely live in-game position card shows 'iN · LIVE' with green dot (N = actual inning)
A resolved/closed position (if any remain visible) shows 'FINAL'
verification: Reload dashboard with the LAD@WSN open trade showing.
If LAD@WSN has not started: pill shows 'LAD @ WSN · SCHEDULED' with no green dot and no inning number.
If LAD@WSN is live: pill shows 'LAD @ WSN · iN · LIVE' with green dot.
Check browser console for JS errors.
